arts.ttl: Totti Reflects on Friendship with Del Piero as Juventus Legend Turns 50
arts.sum: Francesco Totti, the iconic Roma captain, recently gave an extensive interview to celebrate Alessandro Del Piero’s 50th birthday. The two Italian football legends, once seen as rivals, have maintained a strong friendship throughout their careers and beyond. Totti began by expressing his disbelief at Del Piero’s milestone: “It seems hard to believe. Fifty years. It feels like yesterday we were two eighteen, twenty-year-old boys. Far apart, mind you: he was winning league titles, playing in the Champions Cup. Me… well, it took me a bit longer. But we watched each other, studied each other, maybe even sought each other out, The post Totti Reflects on Friendship with Del Piero as Juventus Legend Turns 50 appeared first on FootItalia.com.
